title: Quality Inn & Suites Bathurst
description: Relaxed rooms & suites in a modest hotel offering a fitness center & free cooked breakfast.
address: 777 St Peter Ave, Bathurst, NB E2A 2Y9, Canada
hotelDescription:
In a tranquil residential area, this low-key hotel is 2 miles from Bathurst Heritage Museum and 5 miles from Youghall Beach Park. Regional Bathurst Airport is 4 miles away.
 Relaxed rooms with cozy decor offer free Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and tea and coffeemakers. Suites sleep up to 4 guests and add sitting areas.
 Parking and cooked breakfast are complimentary. Other amenities include a fitness center and event space.
